message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle rectangle
skinparam actorStyle awesome
skinparam databaseStyle cylinder
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam sequence {
    LifeLineBackgroundColor #F0F0F0
    LifeLineBorderColor #CCCCCC
    ParticipantBackgroundColor #E0E0E0
    ParticipantBorderColor #999999
    ParticipantPadding 10
    BoxPadding 10
}

actor "main" as main
participant "bkup.BackupFacade" as facade
participant "srcrepo.SourceRepository" as srcrepo
participant "dstrepo.DestinationRepository" as dstrepo
participant "metarepo.MetadataRepository" as metarepo
participant "scanner.AllFileScanner" as scanner
database "FileSystem" as fs
database "SQLite3" as db

main -> facade: execute()

frame "Get all files" {
    facade -> scanner: get_all_files()
    scanner -> fs: 
    fs --> scanner: 
    scanner --> facade: all_files
}

frame "Get source files" {
    facade -> srcrepo: get_files_matching_criteria(all_files)
    srcrepo --> facade: src_files
}

frame "Cleanup of metadata corresponding to already deleted files" {
    facade -> metarepo: get_uncontained_keys(src_files)
    metarepo -> db: SELECT
    db --> metarepo: result
    metarepo --> facade: uncontained_keys
    facade -> metarepo: remove_metadatas(uncontained_keys)
    loop "until the generator finishes" {
        metarepo -> db: DELETE
        metarepo --> facade: yield removed_metadata <return value is discarded>
    }
}

frame "Create backup and update metadata" {
    facade -> facade: _get_backup_list(src_files)
    facade --> facade: backup_list
    facade -> dstrepo: create_backups(backup_list)
    loop "until the generator finishes" {
        dstrepo -> fs: shutil.copy2(src_file, dst_file)
        dstrepo --> facade: yield backed_up_src_file
        facade -> metarepo: update_metadata(backed_up_src_file)
        metarepo -> db: REPLACE INTO
    }
}

frame "Discard old backups" {
    facade -> dstrepo: get_discard_list(today, all_files)
    dstrepo --> facade: discard_list
    facade -> dstrepo: remove_backups(discard_list)
    loop "until the generator finishes" {
        dstrepo -> fs: os.remove(file_to_be_removed)
        dstrepo --> facade: yield removed_file <return value is discarded>
    }
}

facade --> main: return

@enduml
```
